testcase.name: test_health_check

failure.message:
assert ('healthy' == 'ok'
- ok + healthy or 'ok' in "{'status': 'healthy'}") + where "{'status': 'healthy'}" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff239462b0f0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff239462b0f0> = "{'status': 'healthy'}".lower + where "{'status': 'healthy'}" = str({'status': 'healthy'})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rbac_iteration39.py:238: in test_health_check assert data.get("status") == "ok" or "ok" in str(data).lower() E assert ('healthy' == 'ok' E E - ok E + healthy or 'ok' in "{'status': 'healthy'}") E + where "{'status': 'healthy'}" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff239462b0f0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff239462b0f0> = "{'status': 'healthy'}".lower E + where "{'status': 'healthy'}" = str({'status': 'healthy'})
